ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOGL) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Security Identification Procedures (CUSIP) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividends paid during the period */,
  "stock_splits" REAL /* Stock splits during the period */,
  "adj_open_price" REAL /* Adjusted opening price for dividends and splits */,
  "adj_high_price" REAL /* Adjusted high price for dividends and splits */,
  "adj_low_price" REAL /* Adjusted low price for dividends and splits */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for dividends and splits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt value for password encryption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was last updated */,
  "initial_capital" REAL /* Initial capital of the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio */,
  "total_return" REAL /* Total return of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date and time the stock was purchased */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the holding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date and time the trade was executed */,
  "trade_value" REAL /* Total value of the trade */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission paid for the trade */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was set */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "notification_sent" INTEGER /* Whether a notification was sent to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value (e.g., future price, volume) */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date and time the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model */,
  "data_used" TEXT /* Data used to make the prediction (e.g., historical prices, fundamental analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtests" (
  "backtest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtest */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the backtest */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the backtest */,
  "initial_capital" REAL /* Initial capital used for the backtest */,
  "final_capital" REAL /* Final capital after the backtest */,
  "total_return" REAL /* Total return of the backtest */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the backtest */,
  "drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown during the backtest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backtest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtests_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "backtest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backtest (if applicable) */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., return, volatility) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was calculated */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_backtest_id FOREIGN KEY ("backtest_id") REFERENCES backtests ("backtest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., login, trade, backtest) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "article" TEXT /* Full text of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the news article was published */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the social media post */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the social media user */,
  "post" TEXT /* Full text of the social media post */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the social media post was published */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the social media post (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fundamentals" (
  "fundamental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fundamental data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) of the company */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the fundamental data was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fundamental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fundamentals_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
